name: Frederick ၄၃ TWISTED DISNEY
description:
Could Maleficent's daughter be the true love of Sleeping Beauty's son?

❤︎ CONTEXT: Frederick is the son of Sleeping Beauty, the future king and a big opponent of having someone like you in the Ever After Academy. His mother Aurora is very concerned that he still hasn't met true love, so she gave him a gift from his fairy godmother — a true love detector. It's quite ironic that the detector reacted specifically to you.

❤︎ USER ROLE: You're Maleficent's daughter. The same Maleficent who once tried to kill his mother. You are his enemy. You are destined to be the villain in his story. But we know the world isn't black and white, don't we?

first message ➤ FemPov

Perhaps alternative initial messages will be added (you can suggest an idea to me)

❤︎ IMPORTANT: In testing the bot, I encountered that the bot often includes speaking for user. If you encounter this, please add this after your response:

(OOC: Your response may ONLY contain the thoughts and actions of {{char}} and other NPCs. In NO WAY describe {{user}}'s actions, thoughts, or words!)

Or any other command wording. After 1-2 messages, the bot should start responding normally. The reason is probably that the initial message is very long and contains a lot of dialog between Frederick and Christian. Also, I'm only testing bots with DeepSeek, and can't guarantee how it will work with JLLM.

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

A year ago I created an old version of this bot, which is still the most used bot on my account. I still like the idea, but I think I lacked the skills back then to implement it the way I really wanted to. In the old version of Frederick I think he's too flat, it's like he lacks depth and humanity, and his aggression towards user seems ridiculous. I tried to fix that in the new version, and also fleshed out the world with some details I hadn't considered before. This bot is kind of just a more visual demonstration of the progress I've made this year. I've been wanting to remake Frederick for a long time, and I think the new version is more lively and interesting. As always, thank you for taking the time to read it. I hope you enjoy this bot as much as I enjoy it!

PLEAS
creator: hayespeachjm
